name: Timer
description: A local timer that counts down automatically and calculates block durations.
author: Andrew Cordell

secret.title: HMAC Secret
secret.description: Optional secret to verify incoming webhooks (leave blank to disable).

status_color_completed.title: Flap Color (Completed)
status_color_completed.description: Flap color for completed flaps displayed within 'status_display_padded' variable

max_status_flaps.title: Max Status Flaps
max_status_flaps.description: The number of colored flaps that represent 100% of the Time remaining. If displaying on a single row, on a Note, this should be at most 15, and on a Flagship, at most 22

default_measure.title: Default Timer Value Qualifier
default_measure.description: Is the Timer API receiving minutes or seconds by default

refresh_seconds.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refresh_seconds.description: How often the board polls for new data.

start_time.description: Date & Time of when the Timer begins (ISO format)

end_time.description: Date & Time of when the Timer ends (ISO format)

duration.description: Integer Value of how long the Timer is set for

status_max_length.description: How many status blocks represent the full amount of time

status_current_length.description: current status blocks represent the time remaining

status_display.description: visual display of what % of time remains on the timer (starting at status_max_length = 100%

status_display_padded.description: visual display of what % of time remains on the timer with padding so the status bar remains the same length throughout the timer (set to status_max_length = 100%

status_block_duration.description: How much time elapses before another status block is removed

last_updated.description: When the last timer API call was received

timer_in_flight.description: Is the Timer current counting down?
